exercises.title: Reverse Linked List (LeetCode #206)
Reverse: explain return prev not curr
exercises.instructions: Implement: Reverse: explain return prev not curr.
exercises.expected_solution:
public class WhyPrev{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println("After loop: curr=null (past end), prev=last node processed");System.out.println("Last node = original LAST node = NEW HEAD after reversal");System.out.println("Return prev: new head. Return curr: null (wrong!)");System.out.println("For [1,2,3]: after loop prev=3, curr=null. Return 3=new head.");}
}

exercises.title: Trace 3-pointer on [1,2,3]
exercises.expected_solution:
public class Trace3Ptr{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println("Start: prev=null, curr=1, next=?");System.out.println("Step1: next=2; 1.next=null; prev=1; curr=2 → null←1  2→3");System.out.println("Step2: next=3; 2.next=1; prev=2; curr=3 → null←1←2  3");System.out.println("Step3: next=null; 3.next=2; prev=3; curr=null → 3←2←1←null");System.out.println("Loop ends. Return prev=3. Result: 3→2→1→null");}
}
